category_sources: Official bzip3 repository describes it as a better and stronger spiritual successor to BZip2.
source_facts.description says bzip3 is a stronger spiritual successor to BZip2.
docs_sources: Official bzip3 GitHub repository README is the main documentation surface; source_facts.homepage redirects there.

tags_sources: Official repository README documents bzip3 command-line tools and compression project scope.
